creator: yasu@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Mikhail T. from comment #1)

In bug #222458 maintainer of devel/py-pylru-cache told me following examples in Porter's Handbook.

https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/licenses.html#licenses-license-ex1

And there is license file LICENSE.txt in source archive of this port. So LICENSE_FILE should be defined in this case.
